lead.titleZh: 肩关节置换术后早期康复与高强度激光治疗神经卡压：各有一项高分系统综述和 RCT
lead.titleEn: Early Rehab Post Shoulder Arthroplasty & High-Intensity Laser for Nerve Entrapment: High-Score SR and RCT
lead.paragraphZh: 今日共 26 篇文章，覆盖 7 个专科。骨科与肌骨以及手法与理疗领域各有 1 篇 curatedScore 85 的高分研究。反式全肩关节置换术后早期康复的系统综述，以及高强度激光治疗股外侧皮神经卡压的 RCT，均值得临床 PT 关注。
lead.paragraphEn: Today's digest features 26 articles across 7 specialties. Orthopedics & Musculoskeletal and Manual Therapy & Physical Modalities each presented a curatedScore 85 study. A systematic review on early rehabilitation post reverse total shoulder arthroplasty and an RCT on high-intensity laser therapy for meralgia paresthetica are both noteworthy for clinicians.

items.title: Early versus conventional postoperative rehabilitation after reverse total shoulder arthroplasty: a systematic review of functional outcomes and complications.
items.summary: A systematic review found no significant differences in functional outcomes or complications between early (≤ 14 days) and delayed (≥ 28 days) postoperative rehabilitation protocols following primary reverse total shoulder arthroplasty (rTSA).
items.curatedReason: 对反式全肩关节置换术（rTSA）术后康复，早期启动（14 天内）和传统（28 天后）方案在功能结局和并发症方面没有显著差异。你可以依据患者个体情况和耐受度选择康复启动时机，不必强制推迟。
items.titleZh: 反式全肩关节置换术后早期与传统康复的功能结局和并发症比较：一项系统综述。
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述显示，反式全肩关节置换术后早期（14 天内）与传统（28 天后）康复方案在功能结局和并发症方面无显著差异。
items.curatedReasonEn: For reverse total shoulder arthroplasty (rTSA) postoperative rehabilitation, early initiation (within 14 days) and conventional (after 28 days) programs show no significant differences in functional outcomes or complications. You can tailor rehabilitation initiation based on individual patient circumstances and tolerance, without needing to mandate delays.
items.limitation: 原始研究类型包含 RCT 和比较性队列研究，可能存在异质性。
items.limitationEn: The original studies included both RCTs and comparative cohort studies, which may introduce heterogeneity.

items.title: Exercise interventions for rotator cuff-related shoulder pain in middle-aged and older adults: a systematic review and meta-analysis.
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis confirmed the effectiveness of exercise-based interventions for rotator cuff-related shoulder pain in middle-aged and older adults, showing moderate to large improvements in pain, function, ROM, and strength.
items.curatedReason: 运动干预对中老年肩袖相关疼痛的改善效果是明确的，特别是对疼痛和功能有中等至大的效应量。在你的临床实践中，运动疗法应作为这类患者的一线治疗选择。
items.titleZh: 中老年肩袖相关性肩痛的运动干预：一项系统综述和 Meta 分析。
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述和 Meta 分析证实，运动干预对中老年肩袖相关性肩痛有效，能中度至大幅改善疼痛、功能、关节活动度和力量。
items.curatedReasonEn: Exercise interventions clearly improve rotator cuff-related shoulder pain in middle-aged and older adults, showing moderate to large effect sizes for pain and function. In your clinical practice, exercise therapy should be a first-line treatment option for these patients.
items.limitation: 纳入研究的异质性可能影响了综合结果的精确性，需要注意各研究的具体干预方案。
items.limitationEn: Heterogeneity among included studies may affect the precision of the aggregated results, requiring attention to specific intervention protocols.

items.title: The impact of a brief online education intervention on the knowledge, attitudes and beliefs of qualified physiotherapists about chronic low back pain: Pre- and post-intervention survey.
items.summary: A pre- and post-intervention survey found that a brief online education program significantly improved qualified physiotherapists' knowledge, attitudes, and beliefs about chronic low back pain, facilitating a shift towards biopsychosocial approaches.
items.curatedReason: 简短的在线教育干预能有效改善物理治疗师对慢性腰痛的知识、态度和信念。这提示在线教育是推广生物心理社会模式的有效途径，值得你在团队教育中考虑。
items.titleZh: 简短在线教育干预对物理治疗师慢性腰痛知识、态度和信念的影响：干预前后调查。
items.summaryZh: 一项干预前后调查显示，简短在线教育能显著改善物理治疗师对慢性腰痛的知识、态度和信念，促进向生物心理社会模式的转变。
items.curatedReasonEn: A brief online educational intervention can effectively improve physiotherapists' knowledge, attitudes, and beliefs regarding chronic low back pain. This suggests online education is a viable method for promoting the biopsychosocial model, worth considering for your team's continuing education.
items.limitation: 本研究为单一国家（南非）的在线干预调查，其结果在外推至其他文化或医疗系统时需谨慎。
items.limitationEn: This study was a single-country (South Africa) online intervention survey, and its findings should be generalized to other cultures or healthcare systems with caution.
items.journal: The South African journal of physiotherapy

items.title: Comparative effectiveness of supervised individual, group-based, and mixed physiotherapy approaches on pain and function in patients with chronic pain in primary care: a retrospective observational study.
items.summary: A retrospective observational study compared supervised individual, group-based, and mixed physiotherapy approaches for chronic pain in primary care, finding no clear superiority of any single approach on pain and function.
items.curatedReason: 对于慢性疼痛患者，团体治疗与个体治疗在疼痛和功能结局上差异不显著，混合方式也未显示出优越性。这表明在初级保健中，团体治疗是提供高价值康复的有效选项，你可以根据资源和患者偏好灵活选择。
items.titleZh: 初级保健中个体、团体及混合物理治疗对慢性疼痛患者疼痛与功能的比较效果：回顾性观察研究。
items.summaryZh: 一项回顾性观察研究比较了初级保健中，个体、团体及混合物理治疗对慢性疼痛患者疼痛与功能的影响，未发现任何单一方法具有明显优势。
items.curatedReasonEn: For chronic pain patients, group therapy is not significantly different from individual therapy in terms of pain and functional outcomes, and a mixed approach showed no superiority. This suggests that group therapy is a valuable option for delivering high-value rehabilitation in primary care, allowing you flexibility based on resources and patient preferences.
items.limitation: 本研究为回顾性观察研究，存在选择偏倚和混杂因素的风险。
items.limitationEn: This was a retrospective observational study, carrying risks of selection bias and confounding factors.

items.title: Appropriate translational designs for determining causal force-based (manual therapy) treatment mechanisms.
items.summary: A review highlights the need for translational designs to establish causal mechanisms in force-based manual therapy, identifying current study limitations in demonstrating 'why' and 'how' treatments work.
items.curatedReason: 这篇综述探讨了手法治疗机制研究设计的局限性，强调需要更具因果推断能力的设计。它为该领域的研究者提供了重要的思考方向，但尚未直接改变临床实践。
items.titleZh: 确定手法治疗机制的恰当转化研究设计：基于力的治疗。
items.summaryZh: 这篇综述强调了在手法治疗中，研究设计需要能够阐明治疗机制的因果关系，指出当前研究在解释治疗“为何”和“如何”起效方面存在不足。
items.curatedReasonEn: This review explores limitations in translational study designs for manual therapy mechanisms, emphasizing the need for more causally inferential designs. It provides important considerations for researchers in the field but does not directly alter clinical practice.
items.limitation: 研究设计方法论的探讨，结论不直接涉及具体临床应用。
items.limitationEn: Discussion of research design methodology, with conclusions not directly related to specific clinical applications.

items.title: Diagnostic and prognostic accuracy of Berg Balance Scale and Mini-Balance Evaluation Systems Test in individuals with stroke: A systematic review and meta-analysis.
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis is evaluating the diagnostic and prognostic accuracy of Berg Balance Scale (BBS) and Mini-Balance Evaluation Systems Test (Mini-BESTest) cutoff values in individuals with stroke, aiming to clarify their utility for different reference standards.
items.curatedReason: BBS 和 Mini-BESTest 是评估卒中患者平衡功能的有效工具。这项研究将帮助你了解它们在诊断和预后评估中的精确截止值，从而更准确地选择和应用这些量表。
items.titleZh: 卒中患者 Berg 平衡量表和 Mini-平衡评估系统测试的诊断和预后准确性：一项系统综述和 Meta 分析。
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述和 Meta 分析正在评估卒中患者 Berg 平衡量表（BBS）和 Mini-平衡评估系统测试（Mini-BESTest）截止值在诊断和预后评估中的准确性，旨在明确其在不同参考标准下的实用性。
items.curatedReasonEn: The BBS and Mini-BESTest are effective tools for assessing balance function in stroke patients. This study will help you understand their precise cutoff values for diagnostic and prognostic assessment, enabling you to select and apply these scales more accurately.
items.limitation: 系统综述的精确性和推荐强度取决于纳入研究的质量和统一性。
items.limitationEn: The precision and strength of recommendations from a systematic review depend on the quality and consistency of included studies.

items.title: "Comparison Between Robotic and Conventional Walking Recovery Training Methods in People With Spinal Cord Injury": Systematic Review with Pairwise and Network meta-analysis.
items.summary: A systematic review and network meta-analysis of 16 studies compared Robotic Body Weight Supported Treadmill Training (RBWSTT), Overground Robotic Exoskeleton Training (ORET), and Conventional Physiotherapy (CP) on gait and cardiovascular outcomes in individuals with Spinal Cord Injury (SCI).
items.curatedReason: 对于脊髓损伤患者的步行恢复训练，机器人辅助训练（RBWSTT, ORET）与传统物理治疗的疗效对比仍存在争议。在具体患者选择时，结合伤情、资源和个体反应，可以考虑作为传统治疗的辅助或替代方案。
items.titleZh: 机器人与传统步行恢复训练方法在脊髓损伤患者中的比较：系统综述与配对及网络荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项包含16项研究的系统综述和网络荟萃分析比较了机器人体重支持跑步机训练（RBWSTT）、地面机器人外骨骼训练（ORET）和传统物理治疗（CP）对脊髓损伤患者步态和心血管结局的影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: The comparison between robotic-assisted training (RBWSTT, ORET) and conventional physiotherapy for walking recovery in SCI patients remains controversial. When selecting for specific patients, consider robotic options as adjuncts or alternatives to conventional therapy, based on injury characteristics, resources, and individual response.
items.limitation: 纳入研究（N=16）数量较少，不同干预类型和患者亚组间的比较数据有限。
items.limitationEn: The number of included studies (N=16) was small, and comparative data between different intervention types and patient subgroups were limited.
items.journal: American journal of physical medicine & rehabilitation

items.title: Community-Based Exercise for Chronic Pain in People with Spinal Cord Injury: A Pragmatic Randomized Controlled Trial
items.summary: A pragmatic randomized controlled trial tested the hypothesis that home/community-based exercise, prescribed according to the Spinal Cord Injury (SCI) Exercise Guidelines, reduces chronic pain.
items.curatedReason: 按照脊髓损伤（SCI）运动指南制定的社区居家运动方案，有望有效减轻慢性疼痛。这坐实了指南的重要性，并支持你推广此类社区康复模式。
items.titleZh: 脊髓损伤者慢性疼痛的社区运动：一项实用随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项实用随机对照试验旨在验证根据脊髓损伤（SCI）运动指南制定的居家/社区运动方案是否能减轻慢性疼痛。
items.curatedReasonEn: Community- and home-based exercise programs, prescribed according to SCI Exercise Guidelines, are likely effective in reducing chronic pain. This affirms the importance of these guidelines and supports your promotion of such community rehabilitation models.
items.limitation: 未提供具体研究方法和结果数据，无法评估具体效应量和局限性。
items.limitationEn: Specific research methods and outcome data were not provided, making it impossible to assess specific effect sizes and limitations.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Using visual biofeedback to reduce step length error at fast walking speeds is feasible after stroke
items.summary: A study on medRxiv suggests that using visual biofeedback to reduce step length error at fast walking speeds is feasible for individuals after stroke.
items.curatedReason: 这项预印本研究表明，在卒中后患者中，使用视觉生物反馈来减少快走速度下的步长误差是可行的。这为卒中后步态训练提供了新的、有潜力的技术方向，值得临床医生关注。
items.titleZh: 使用视觉生物反馈减少快走速度下的步长误差在卒中后患者中是可行的
items.summaryZh: 这项预印本研究表明，在卒中后患者中，使用视觉生物反馈技术来减少快走速度下的步长误差是可行的，为卒中后步态训练提供了新的方法。
items.curatedReasonEn: This preprint study indicates that using visual biofeedback to reduce step length error at fast walking speeds is feasible in post-stroke patients. This offers a novel and potentially valuable technical approach for gait training after stroke, worthy of clinician attention.
items.limitation: 预印本研究，尚未经过同行评审；样本量较小（n=23）。
items.limitationEn: Preprint study, not yet peer-reviewed; relatively small sample size (n=23).

items.title: "Are Cardiac Rehabilitation Programs Effective in Improving Aerobic Capacity for People with Transient Ischemic Attack and Stroke? A Rapid Review and Meta-analysis".
items.summary: A rapid review and meta-analysis of nine studies (N=490) found that exercise-based cardiac rehabilitation was effective in improving aerobic capacity for people with stroke or transient ischemic attack (TIA).
items.curatedReason: 对于卒中或短暂性脑缺血发作（TIA）患者，基于运动的心脏康复似乎能有效改善有氧能力。考虑将心脏康复元素整合到神经康复方案中，尤其对于有氧能力受损的患者。
items.titleZh: 心脏康复计划在改善短暂性脑缺血发作和卒中患者有氧能力方面的有效性：快速综述与荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项包含9项研究（N=490）的快速综述和荟萃分析发现，基于运动的心脏康复在改善卒中或短暂性脑缺血发作（TIA）患者的有氧能力方面是有效的。
items.curatedReasonEn: For individuals with stroke or TIA, exercise-based cardiac rehabilitation appears effective in improving aerobic capacity. Consider integrating cardiac rehabilitation elements into your neurorehabilitation programs, especially for those with impaired aerobic capacity.
items.limitation: 纳入研究（N=490）数量较少，且质量多为低至中等。
items.limitationEn: The number of included studies (N=490) was small, and their quality was mostly low to moderate.
items.journal: American journal of physical medicine & rehabilitation

items.title: Barriers and facilitators to leisure-time physical activity among individuals with spinal cord injury in China: A qualitative study.
items.summary: A qualitative study in China, using semi-structured interviews with 20 community-dwelling adults, explored barriers and facilitators to leisure-time physical activity among individuals with spinal cord injury, guided by the Capability, Opportunity, Motivation-Behaviour model.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究深入探讨了中国脊髓损伤患者休闲时间体育活动的障碍和促成因素。了解这些文化和环境特异性因素，能帮助你为中国患者设计更具针对性和可行性的干预方案。
items.titleZh: 中国脊髓损伤患者休闲时间体育活动的障碍与促成因素：一项定性研究。
items.summaryZh: 一项在中国进行的定性研究，通过对 20 名社区脊髓损伤成年人的半结构化访谈，探讨了休闲时间体育活动的障碍和促成因素，并以能力-机会-动机-行为模型为指导。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study delves into the barriers and facilitators of leisure-time physical activity for individuals with spinal cord injury in China. Understanding these culture- and environment-specific factors can help you design more targeted and feasible intervention programs for Chinese patients.
items.limitation: 本研究为定性研究，样本量小（20 人），结果的普遍性受限。
items.limitationEn: This is a qualitative study with a small sample size (20 participants), limiting the generalizability of the findings.

items.title: Accelerometry-derived physical activity following Achilles tendon rupture: A prospective cohort study.
items.summary: A prospective cohort study used accelerometry to investigate physical activity levels during the first year after Achilles tendon rupture (n=42 at 2 months, n=39 at 6 months, n=36 at 12 months) and explored its relationship with patient-reported outcomes.
items.curatedReason: 这项前瞻性队列研究通过加速度计评估了跟腱断裂患者术后第一年的身体活动水平。这能帮你更客观地了解患者的恢复情况，并识别出那些活动水平不足、需要更多干预的个体。
items.titleZh: 跟腱断裂后通过加速度计测量的身体活动：一项前瞻性队列研究。
items.summaryZh: 一项前瞻性队列研究通过加速度计评估了跟腱断裂患者术后第一年的身体活动水平，并探讨了其与患者报告结局的关系。
items.curatedReasonEn: This prospective cohort study assessed physical activity levels in Achilles tendon rupture patients during the first year post-rupture using accelerometry. This can help you objectively understand patient recovery and identify individuals with insufficient activity levels who may require more intervention.
items.limitation: 本研究为队列研究，可能存在未测量的混杂因素，且患者报告结局可能存在回忆偏倚。
items.limitationEn: This is a cohort study, potentially subject to unmeasured confounding factors, and patient-reported outcomes may be subject to recall bias.

items.title: Lung Boost Trainer Versus Incentive Spirometer on Pulmonary Function Post COVID Hemiplegic Cerebral Palsy Children; Randomized Controlled Trial.
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial compared the efficacy of Lung Boost Trainer versus incentive spirometer on pulmonary function in COVID-hemiplegic cerebral palsy children, aiming to address impaired pulmonary function due to reduced chest wall movement and weak respiratory muscles.
items.curatedReason: 对于因 COVID 导致偏瘫的脑瘫儿童，Lung Boost Trainer 在改善肺功能方面可能优于传统诱发性肺活量计。这提示你可以考虑将 Lung Boost Trainer 作为更有效的呼吸康复工具。
items.titleZh: 肺部增压训练器与诱发性肺活量计在 COVID 偏瘫脑瘫儿童肺功能上的比较：一项随机对照试验。
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试验比较了肺部增压训练器与诱发性肺活量计对 COVID 偏瘫脑瘫儿童肺功能的影响，旨在改善胸壁运动受限和呼吸肌无力导致的肺功能障碍。
items.curatedReasonEn: For children with hemiplegic cerebral palsy due to COVID, the Lung Boost Trainer may be superior to traditional incentive spirometers in improving pulmonary function. This suggests you could consider the Lung Boost Trainer as a more effective respiratory rehabilitation tool.
items.limitation: 这是一项随机对照试验，但其小样本量和对特定病因（COVID）人群的关注可能限制了结果的广泛推论。
items.limitationEn: This is an RCT, but its small sample size and focus on a specific etiology (COVID) population may limit the broad generalizability of the results.
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: Community-Based Resistance Intensive Personal Training (RIPT) Program for Youth with Cerebral Palsy: A Prospective Cohort Pilot Study.
items.summary: A pre-post prospective cohort pilot study evaluated a 12-week goal-focused, community-based power-training program (RIPT) for youth with cerebral palsy, assessing its effects on goal performance, satisfaction, gross motor function (gait speed, walking capacity), and anaerobic capacity.
items.curatedReason: 这项前瞻性队列初步研究显示，社区型阻力强化个人训练（RIPT）项目对脑瘫青少年的目标表现、满意度、粗大运动功能和无氧能力有积极影响。这提示社区模式是可行的，你可以探索在社区环境中提供类似力量训练方案。
items.titleZh: 社区型阻力强化个人训练（RIPT）项目对脑瘫青少年的影响：一项前瞻性队列试点研究。
items.summaryZh: 一项前瞻性队列试点研究评估了为脑瘫青少年设计的 12 周目标导向社区型阻力强化个人训练（RIPT）项目，考察其对目标表现、满意度、粗大运动功能和无氧能力的影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: This prospective cohort pilot study shows positive effects of a community-based Resistance Intensive Personal Training (RIPT) program on goal performance, satisfaction, gross motor function, and anaerobic capacity in youth with CP. This suggests community models are viable, and you can explore offering similar strength training programs in community settings.
items.limitation: 作为前瞻性队列试点研究，样本量小，缺乏对照组，结果需要进一步大型研究验证。
items.limitationEn: As a prospective cohort pilot study, it has a small sample size and lacks a control group, requiring further large-scale validation.

items.title: Ischemic preconditioning alters gait mechanics in older adults with knee osteoarthritis.
items.summary: This study evaluated changes in gait mechanics after a single session of ischemic preconditioning in 30 older adults with knee osteoarthritis, finding alterations in gait mechanics.
items.curatedReason: 缺血预处理（IPC）可能通过改变步态力学来改善膝骨关节炎老年患者的步态。虽然这仅是一次性干预的研究，但提示 IPC 可能是运动疗法之外的辅助手段，值得你关注其长期效果和联合应用的潜力。
items.titleZh: 缺血预处理改变膝骨关节炎老年患者的步态力学。
items.summaryZh: 本研究评估了 30 名膝骨关节炎老年患者单次缺血预处理后的步态力学变化，发现步态力学有所改变。
items.curatedReasonEn: Ischemic preconditioning (IPC) may improve gait mechanics in older adults with knee osteoarthritis by altering gait biomechanics. While this is a single-session intervention study, it suggests IPC could be an adjunct to exercise therapy, and its long-term effects and potential for combined use are worth your attention.
items.limitation: 本研究只评估了单次缺血预处理的效果，缺乏长期随访和功能性结局数据。
items.limitationEn: This study only evaluated the effect of a single session of ischemic preconditioning, lacking long-term follow-up and functional outcome data.

items.title: Efficacy of High-Intensity Laser Therapy for Meralgia Paresthetica: A Randomized, Double-Blind, Sham-Controlled Trial.
items.summary: A randomized, double-blind, sham-controlled trial (N=54 analyzed) found 12 sessions of High-Intensity Laser Therapy (HILT) significantly improved pain (Numeric Rating Scale: -6.4 vs -1.8, p<0.001) and function (MPQ-S: -11.9 vs -3.5, p<0.001) compared to sham in Meralgia Paresthetica (MP) patients at 12 weeks.
items.curatedReason: 高强度激光治疗（HILT）在股外侧皮神经卡压综合征（MP）疼痛和功能改善上显著优于假治疗，并可能改善神经传导。可以将其作为一种有效的非侵入性治疗手段纳入你的方案。
items.titleZh: 高强度激光治疗股外侧皮神经卡压综合征的疗效：一项随机、双盲、假对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项随机、双盲、假对照试验（N=54分析）发现，对于股外侧皮神经卡压综合征（MP）患者，12周内12次高强度激光治疗（HILT）在改善疼痛（数字评定量表：-6.4 vs -1.8, p<0.001）和功能（MPQ-S: -11.9 vs -3.5, p<0.001）方面显著优于假治疗。
items.curatedReasonEn: High-Intensity Laser Therapy (HILT) significantly outperforms sham treatment for pain and functional improvement in Meralgia Paresthetica (MP), and may also improve nerve conduction. You can incorporate it as an effective non-invasive treatment option into your protocols.
items.limitation: 随访期相对较短（12周），长期疗效仍需进一步研究。
items.limitationEn: The follow-up period was relatively short (12 weeks), and long-term efficacy requires further investigation.
items.journal: American journal of physical medicine & rehabilitation

items.title: Short-term relaxation after cervical rotatory manipulation is more closely associated with somatosensory input than cracking sound: a randomized controlled EEG study
items.summary: A randomized controlled EEG study found that short-term relaxation after cervical rotatory manipulation is more closely associated with somatosensory input than the cracking sound.
items.curatedReason: 颈椎旋转手法治疗后的短期放松感，似乎与体感输入而非“咔哒声”更相关。这提示你应更关注手法对神经生理的影响，而不是仅以关节弹响作为疗效指标。
items.titleZh: 颈椎旋转手法治疗后的短期放松与体感输入而非弹响声更密切相关：一项随机对照脑电图研究
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照脑电图研究发现，颈椎旋转手法治疗后的短期放松与体感输入而非弹响声更密切相关。
items.curatedReasonEn: Short-term relaxation after cervical rotatory manipulation appears more associated with somatosensory input than the "cracking sound." This suggests you should focus more on the neurophysiological effects of manual therapy rather than solely using joint cavitation as an indicator of efficacy.
items.limitation: 该研究为随机对照脑电图研究，但可能存在样本量和结局指标的局限性。
items.limitationEn: This is a randomized controlled EEG study, but may have limitations in sample size and outcome measures.

items.title: [Comment] Highlights 2026 photography competition: health and humanity in focus
items.summary: Commentary on The Lancet's annual photography competition, highlighting past winning images and announcing the opening of submissions for Highlights 2026.
items.curatedReason: 这是《柳叶刀》摄影比赛的评论，与临床实践或研究无直接关联。
items.titleZh: [评论] Highlights 2026 摄影比赛：聚焦健康与人文
items.summaryZh: 这篇评论介绍了《柳叶刀》年度摄影比赛，回顾了往届获奖作品，并宣布 Highlights 2026 摄影比赛开始接受投稿。
items.curatedReasonEn: This is a commentary on The Lancet's photography competition and has no direct relevance to clinical practice or research.

items.title: [Comment] The Wakley Prize 2026: learning experience
items.summary: A commentary reflects on the learning experience in medicine, emphasizing that mastery is transient and continuous learning is essential, especially for early-career clinicians.
items.curatedReason: 这篇评论分享了关于医学学习和实践的感悟，特别是对早期职业临床医生的启发，与物理治疗的直接关联性较低。
items.titleZh: [评论] The Wakley Prize 2026：学习经历
items.summaryZh: 这篇评论引用了医生作家的话，强调医学实践中不断学习的重要性，尤其对于早期职业临床医生而言。
items.curatedReasonEn: This commentary shares reflections on medical learning and practice, particularly inspiring for early-career clinicians, with low direct relevance to physical therapy.

items.title: [World Report] WHO and Africa CDC launch $518 million Ebola plan
items.summary: World report on the launch of a $518 million Ebola plan by WHO and Africa CDC to control the Bundibugyo Ebola virus outbreak.
items.curatedReason: 世界报道，关于 WHO 和非洲 CDC 启动一项埃博拉防控计划。与物理治疗的直接相关性不高。
items.titleZh: [世界报道] WHO 与非洲 CDC 启动 5.18 亿美元的埃博拉计划
items.summaryZh: 世界报道称，WHO 与非洲 CDC 联合启动了一项 5.18 亿美元的埃博拉计划，以期统一协调控制 Bundibugyo 埃博拉病毒疫情。
items.curatedReasonEn: World report on WHO and Africa CDC launching an Ebola preparedness plan. Low direct relevance to physical therapy.

items.title: [World Report] Petition calls for boycott of Israeli Medical Association
items.summary: World report on a petition calling for the suspension of the Israeli Medical Association from the World Medical Association over its stance on Gaza.
items.curatedReason: 世界报道，关于抵制以色列医学会的请愿。此新闻与公共卫生或政治相关，与物理治疗临床实践无直接关联。
items.titleZh: [世界报道] 请愿呼吁抵制以色列医学会
items.summaryZh: 世界报道称，有批评者呼吁暂停以色列医学会（IMA）在世界医学会（WMA）的会员资格，理由是其在加沙问题上的立场。
items.curatedReasonEn: World report on a petition calling for a boycott of the Israeli Medical Association. This news is related to public health or politics and has no direct relevance to physical therapy clinical practice.

items.title: [World Report] The medicine of…cruise ships
items.summary: World report examining the practice of medicine on cruise ships, going beyond recent outbreaks to discuss day-to-day medical operations.
items.curatedReason: 世界报道，探讨邮轮上的医疗实践，提到了过去的疫情，但主要内容是日常医疗，与 PT 实践关系不大。
items.titleZh: [世界报道] 邮轮上的医学
items.summaryZh: 这篇世界报道探讨了邮轮上的医学实践，虽然提到了过去的疫情，但重点在于日常的医疗工作。
items.curatedReasonEn: World report discussing medical practice on cruise ships, mentioning past outbreaks but focusing on daily practice, which has little relation to PT practice.

items.title: [Perspectives] Art on repeat prescription
items.summary: A perspective piece discusses the restorative benefits of engaging in activities like reading, writing, and painting during stressful times, contrasting this with doctors potentially being less likely to participate.
items.curatedReason: 视角文章，作者分享了艺术活动对个人的舒缓作用，并担忧医生可能较少参与此类活动。此文更多是关于个人福祉的探讨，与 PT 临床干预关联性不强。
items.titleZh: [视角] 艺术处方
items.summaryZh: 这篇视角文章分享了作者在压力下通过阅读、写作和绘画等艺术活动获得身心舒缓的体验，并对医生可能较少参与此类活动表示担忧。
items.curatedReasonEn: Perspective piece where the author shares the soothing effects of artistic activities on individuals and expresses concern that doctors may engage less in such activities. This article is more about personal well-being and has weak relevance to PT clinical interventions.
